note: Curated list of highest-rated GitHub repos for autonomous agent patterns. Read by KNOWLEDGE_WEAVER every cycle to inject context about external best practices. Updated by REPO_SPIDER when new high-value repos are discovered.

autonomous_agents.description: Self-running agents that loop, plan, execute, self-correct

repos.relevance_to_solarpunk: CRITICAL — core loop pattern: Plan → Execute → Observe → Repeat. Their 'continuous mode' is exactly what OMNIBUS does. Study their error-recovery and task-chaining for SELF_BUILDER improvements.
repos.integration_idea: Adopt their plugin/skill registration pattern for SolarPunk engines

repos.relevance_to_solarpunk: HIGH — multi-agent conversation where agents delegate to each other. Pattern: KNOWLEDGE_WEAVER could spawn sub-agents that converse to refine code before writing it.
repos.integration_idea: Use conversation pattern in SELF_BUILDER: have a 'critic' agent review generated code before it's written

repos.relevance_to_solarpunk: HIGH — role-based crew coordination. Pattern: assign roles (Researcher, Writer, Publisher) — maps directly to SolarPunk's CONTENT_HARVESTER → SYNTHESIS_FACTORY → STORE_BUILDER pipeline.
repos.integration_idea: Model OMNIBUS task ordering after crewAI's sequential/parallel execution modes

repos.relevance_to_solarpunk: HIGH — LLM 'software company': PM → Architect → Engineer → QA all run as agents. KNOWLEDGE_WEAVER could use this pattern to have Claude review its own generated code.
repos.integration_idea: Add a code-review pass in KNOWLEDGE_WEAVER before writing generated engine to disk

memory_and_persistence.description: Agents with persistent memory across sessions — key for SolarPunk's cross-cycle learning

repos.relevance_to_solarpunk: CRITICAL — persistent memory layer for AI agents. SolarPunk's brain_state.json is a manual version of this. mem0's auto-extraction pattern (what to remember vs forget) should inform MEMORY_PALACE.
repos.integration_idea: Enhance MEMORY_PALACE to auto-extract key facts from every engine run, not just log raw JSON

repos.relevance_to_solarpunk: HIGH — stateful LLM agents with 'archival memory'. Their in-context memory management pattern prevents context window overflow — critical for KNOWLEDGE_WEAVER's growing prompt.
repos.integration_idea: KNOWLEDGE_WEAVER's snapshot should compress old cycle data like Letta's archival memory

multi_model_routing.description: Resilient AI backends — directly applicable to AI_CLIENT.py's Anthropic->HF fallback

repos.relevance_to_solarpunk: CRITICAL — unified LLM API for 100+ providers. AI_CLIENT.py's manual fallback logic is a tiny subset of what litellm does. Adopt their retry/fallback/load-balancing patterns.
repos.integration_idea: Replace AI_CLIENT.py's manual fallback with litellm-style provider list + automatic retry
repos.quick_win: Add retry with exponential backoff to _ask_anthropic() — fixes the 400 transient errors

repos.relevance_to_solarpunk: MEDIUM — study their streaming + retry patterns for AI_CLIENT

workflow_automation.description: Orchestration engines that run complex pipelines — applicable to OMNIBUS

repos.relevance_to_solarpunk: HIGH — visual workflow automation. Study their node connection model and error handling. Their 'continue on fail' pattern should be in OMNIBUS.
repos.integration_idea: OMNIBUS should support conditional engine skipping based on previous engine output

repos.relevance_to_solarpunk: MEDIUM — open-source Zapier. Their piece/connector pattern maps to SolarPunk engines.
HIGH — graph-based agent execution. Nodes = engines, edges = data flow. This is exactly what KNOWLEDGE_BRIDGE is mapping! Use LangGraph's cycle detection + conditional edges.
repos.integration_idea: Model KNOWLEDGE_BRIDGE's gap analysis after LangGraph's edge definition to auto-wire missing connections

code_agents.description: Agents that write, test, and deploy their own code — directly relevant to SELF_BUILDER

repos.relevance_to_solarpunk: HIGH — agent that fixes GitHub issues autonomously. Their 'ACI' (Agent-Computer Interface) pattern gives SELF_BUILDER a model for how to read+edit code safely.
repos.integration_idea: SELF_BUILDER should lint-check generated code before writing (add a compile() + pyflakes pass)

repos.relevance_to_solarpunk: HIGH — full dev agent with sandboxed execution. Their event-stream architecture for agent actions is a mature version of OMNIBUS's engine sequence.
MEDIUM — AI pair programmer. Their repo-map (understanding code structure before editing) should inform KNOWLEDGE_WEAVER's context snapshot.

knowledge_and_rag.description: Retrieval and knowledge management — for KNOWLEDGE_WEAVER and MEMORY_PALACE

repos.relevance_to_solarpunk: HIGH — data framework for LLMs. Their document indexing + query engine is what KNOWLEDGE_WEAVER needs to search across all engine code and data files.
repos.integration_idea: KNOWLEDGE_WEAVER's snapshot is just raw JSON — add vector-search over data/ for smarter gap detection

repos.relevance_to_solarpunk: MEDIUM — graph-based knowledge retrieval. Maps relationships between concepts. Could power a smarter KNOWLEDGE_BRIDGE that understands semantic connections, not just file I/O.

github_actions_automation.description: Patterns for the GitHub Actions infrastructure SolarPunk runs on

repos.relevance_to_solarpunk: MEDIUM — run GitHub Actions locally. Useful for testing OMNIBUS without pushing.
LOW — run workflows only when relevant files change. Could reduce Actions minutes.

revenue_and_distribution.description: Open-source patterns for content distribution and monetization

repos.relevance_to_solarpunk: MEDIUM — open-source survey/feedback. Study their webhook pattern for DISPATCH_HANDLER.
LOW — scheduling. Their booking webhook could feed EMAIL_AGENT_EXCHANGE.

immediate_wins: Add retry with exponential backoff to AI_CLIENT._ask_anthropic() — pattern from litellm
Add code-review pass in KNOWLEDGE_WEAVER before writing engine — pattern from MetaGPT
Compress KNOWLEDGE_WEAVER context snapshot — pattern from Letta archival memory
Add conditional engine skipping in OMNIBUS — pattern from n8n 'continue on fail'
Enhance REPO_SPIDER to target these priority repos by name, not just topic search
